title: Hidden UX Investigation Standard
purpose: Defines hidden and supporting UX lanes agents must investigate because they can materially affect user experience without appearing as obvious route content.
rules: Investigate hidden lanes after route inventory exists and before declaring route coverage complete.
Capture hidden behavior when it changes what users can see, do, access, recover from, or understand.
Do not model implementation providers, stores, or hooks as UX authority; model their user-visible effects.
If a hidden lane is suspected but not observable, mark it pending or needs-proof rather than omitting it.
Hidden lanes may link to multiple routes and surfaces.
